Backend
=======

The backend is a Flask application in `backend/main`.

Main entry
----------

The application factory is defined in :mod:`main.app` (function ``create_app``).

Modules
-------

The following blueprint-level guides document endpoints, parameters and example responses:

.. toctree::
	:maxdepth: 1

	backend/account
	backend/authentication
	backend/recipe
	backend/search_recipe
	backend/view_recipe
	backend/database
